booking_horizon_note: Bookable today: up to 18 Oct 2026 (179 days / 25 weeks out). 19 Oct redirects to coach-only page — just beyond Trainline horizon. Horizon rolls forward +1 day daily. Next Tuesday to unlock: 20 Oct (available 24 Apr 2026).
constraint_note: Sophie commutes peak morning — no later than the 07:36 from Yatton. Fares in this window are £100+ (peak Advance), not the £27-£67 off-peak tier that's only on the 08:08+.

current._note_on_source: Captured via Trainline + SplitSave. In-window only (07:06/07:36 out, 19:30 back).

tuesdays.note: Tickets already booked & paid — locked in. In-window cheapest is £91.90 (07:06 or 07:36 out £43.40 SplitSave + 19:30 back £48.50). Trainline also shows an £87.80 Super Off-Peak return, but that needs a 09:41+ outbound — too late for Sophie. BOOK_SOON.
